lifecycle.title: Lifecycle & Supply Chain
lifecycle.subtitle: Post-market records: the conformity module, supply-chain register, monitoring log, security-test schedule, vulnerability advisories, and end-of-support — all exportable.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

conformity.description: The chosen conformity-assessment module, notified body, and any surveillance-audit notes (Art 32 / Annex VIII).

supply.description: Upstream suppliers and downstream operators in the product's supply chain (Art 23).
supply.retention: Keep these records for 10 years after placing on the market (Art 23).
supply.name: Name

monitoring.description: A running log of documented cybersecurity aspects and vulnerabilities over the product's life (Art 13(7)).

advisories.description: A public-disclosure advisory per remediated vulnerability (Annex I Part II(4)).
advisories.title: Title

tests.description: A recurring security-testing schedule and log — penetration tests, fuzzing, code analysis (Annex I Part II(3)).

eos.description: The support-period end-date, the end-of-support notice to users (Art 13(19)) and the corrective-action / recall procedure (Art 13(21)).
eos.unset: Set the support period on the product overview.
eos.noticePlaceholder: The message users receive when support ends…
eos.correctivePlaceholder: How you will withdraw, recall or remediate the product if it presents a significant cybersecurity risk…
